title: Lead Instructional Designer at Oxford University Press India

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Oxford University Press India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Oxford University Press India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About Oxford University Press India:
Oxford University Press India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oxford University Press India!
